entries.claim_text: Vector Database Comparison: does GitHub issue #62's feature table still hold
entries.quoted_snippet: Recall-QPS (1/s) tradeoff - up and to the right is better

entries.claim_text: survey：跨來源比較而非單篇論文摘要
entries.quoted_snippet: the performance of in-memory approximate nearest neighbor algorithms

entries.claim_text: S1 為 ANN-Benchmarks: A Benchmarking Tool for Approximate Nearest Neighbor Algorithms（arXiv:1807.05614）
entries.quoted_snippet: ANN-Benchmarks: A Benchmarking Tool for Approximate Nearest Neighbor Algorithms

entries.claim_text: 所有網路來源的擷取日為 2026-07-05；S1/S2 為 arXiv preprint 全文，正式版可能略有差異
entries.quoted_snippet: 所有網路來源的擷取日為 2026-07-05

entries.claim_text: 中立學術 benchmark 把橫軸畫成 recall、縱軸畫成 QPS，每個引擎是一條曲線而非一個點
entries.quoted_snippet: Recall-QPS (1/s) tradeoff - up and to the right is better

entries.claim_text: NeurIPS'21 競賽在固定 QPS 下比 recall，Track 1 表頭寫 Recall/AP achieved at 10000 QPS on Azure F32v2 VM with 32 vCPUs
entries.quoted_snippet: Recall/AP achieved at 10000 QPS on Azure F32v2 VM with 32 vCPUs

entries.claim_text: 另有一欄直接叫 Querries per second at 90% recall
entries.quoted_snippet: Querries per second at 90\% recall

entries.claim_text: S1 量的是 in-memory 單機 library，每個演算法 is run in an isolated Docker container
entries.quoted_snippet: is run in an isolated Docker container

entries.claim_text: S1 把 NYTimes 記為 234791/10000 筆、256 維、Euclidean，與 seed 的 nyt-256-angular 約 29 萬向量錯位
entries.quoted_snippet: \textsf{NYTimes} & 234\,791 / 10\,000 & 256 & Euclidean

entries.claim_text: 看一個把三件套標齊的實測
entries.quoted_snippet: r6id.4xlarge machine instances, which have 16 vCPUs and 128 GB
471.57 queries per second
p95 latency (36.73 ms vs. 60.42 ms)

entries.claim_text: 沒有全域贏家
entries.quoted_snippet: 11.4x more throughput than Qdrant

entries.claim_text: Qdrant 自家 benchmark 的結論句是 highest RPS and lowest latencies in almost all the scenarios
entries.quoted_snippet: highest RPS and lowest latencies in almost all the scenarios

entries.claim_text: VectorDBBench README 逐字自承 sponsored by Zilliz
entries.quoted_snippet: sponsored by Zilliz

entries.claim_text: BSD-3-Clause
entries.quoted_snippet: "spdx_id":"BSD-3-Clause"

entries.claim_text: 從來不用 HNSW
entries.quoted_snippet: does not use Hierarchical Navigable Small World (HNSW)

entries.claim_text: Elastic 2024-08 宣布新增 AGPL，且明言 adding another option, and not removing anything
entries.quoted_snippet: adding another option, and not removing anything

entries.claim_text: AGPL 是 an OSI approved license，故 Elasticsearch 重新可稱開源
entries.quoted_snippet: AGPL, an OSI approved license

entries.claim_text: pgvector 的 LICENSE 是 PostgreSQL License 而非 Apache
entries.quoted_snippet: Permission to use, copy, modify, and distribute this software

entries.claim_text: Milvus star 從 seed 的 23k 漲到實測 45073
entries.quoted_snippet: "stargazers_count":45073

entries.claim_text: Pinecone 官方安全文件逐字寫 Pinecone uses role-based access controls (RBAC) to manage access to resources
entries.quoted_snippet: Pinecone uses role-based access controls (RBAC) to manage access to resources

entries.claim_text: Qdrant 官方 1.9 版公告以 granular access control using JSON Web Tokens (JWT) 鋪陳 RBAC
entries.quoted_snippet: granular access control using JSON Web Tokens (JWT)

entries.claim_text: 2026 的 hybrid = 稠密向量與 BM25 兩路並跑再融合，權威定義為 vector search and a keyword search in parallel 交給 RRF
entries.quoted_snippet: Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF), which combines and ranks the objects into a single list

entries.claim_text: hybrid 指兩路檢索並跑 vector search and a keyword search in parallel，與 scalar filtering 是兩件事
entries.quoted_snippet: vector search and a keyword search in parallel

entries.claim_text: Pinecone 官方逐字強調自己 does not use Hierarchical Navigable Small World (HNSW)，改用 serverless 下依 slab 大小挑選的專有索引
entries.quoted_snippet: does not use Hierarchical Navigable Small World (HNSW)

entries.claim_text: 各家早已分岔，Milvus/Weaviate/Elasticsearch 各有 HNSW/IVF/DiskANN/flat 等多種 base index，seed 整欄漏掉 quantization
entries.quoted_snippet: 現代的索引比較應該把 base graph 演算法與 quantization 變體分成兩軸

entries.claim_text: issue #62 的粗欄大致可用，但把效能寫成單一 QPS 數字在方法論上站不住，是量錯了維度
entries.quoted_snippet: 它把效能寫成單一 qps 數字，這在方法論上就站不住

entries.claim_text: S1/S2/TigerData 三者實驗設定互不相容、不能並列成一張表，且廠商 benchmark 幾乎都自家贏
entries.quoted_snippet: 本稽核用到的量化來源，實驗設定互不相容

entries.claim_text: seed 最大的錯是欄位設計而非某格填錯，重填數字修不好，得換維度
entries.quoted_snippet: 它最大的錯不是某格填錯，而是欄位設計

entries.claim_text: 這張表只能給選型方向、不能給排名；唯一能關閉排名的方法是在自己的 dataset、固定 recall、同一台機器上實測
entries.quoted_snippet: 任何現成表格都答不了
